cost.human_maintenance: meteor keyframe conversion + FX_PERF_JS controller + ambient_perf_audit tool + browser tests + verifier + adversarial review

value.stage: S7 UI/UX Motion & Performance (P03 ambient perf)
value.acceptance: PASS (verifier re-derives; all ambient loops compositor-safe = the >=55 FPS guarantee; browser proves low-end degrades ambient while foreground survives + pause-when-hidden)
value.user_value: the six-theme ambient motion now runs on the GPU compositor (no per-frame layout jank), pauses when the tab is backgrounded (saves battery/CPU), and gracefully degrades on low-end phones without ever removing the foreground click feedback -- keeping the 'advanced feel' smooth
value.realized_on_deploy: the optimization is source-complete and byte-safe for the visual identity; a real median-FPS field number lands after deploy (NOT_DEPLOYED now)

unknown_not_zero: a real median-FPS number is UNKNOWN until deployed to a foregrounded browser (the preview throttles rAF); the load-bearing >=55 FPS guarantee is deterministic compositor-only ambient animation, not a measured number.
